# Sirens' Sweets

Sirens' Sweets is an Orange County, California custom bakery specializing in custom designed cakes, cookies, cupcakes, cake pops, logo cookies and allergy-friendly baked goods.

## Core services
- Custom buttercream cakes
- Fondant cakes, sculpted cakes and 3D cakes
- Cupcakes and cupcake toppers
- Custom cookies and logo cookies
- Cake pops
- Muffins and scones
- Gluten-free, nut-free, egg-free, dairy-free, sugar-free and organic options by request

## Contact and orders
- Phone: 949-616-8482
- Email: erin@sirenssweets.com
- Service area: Orange County, California
